block.areascale.display_platform.occupie: This platform already has a structure on it. Right-click empty-handed to pick it up first.
block.areascale.display_platform.invalid: This capsule doesn't have a structure captured in it.
commands.areascale.no_selection: You need to select two positions first. Left-click a block with the Selection Wand for position 1, right-click for position 2.
commands.areascale.different_dimension: Both selection points must be in the dimension you are currently in.
commands.areascale.invalid_factor: The factor must be greater than 0.
commands.areascale.empty_selection: That selection doesn't contain any blocks.
commands.areascale.too_large: That selection has too many blocks to capture (server limit is %s, yours has %s) - ask a server admin to raise maxCaptureBlocks in config/areascale.json if needed.
commands.areascale.captured: Captured a %s x%s structure capsule (%s x %s x %s, %s blocks) - it's in your inventory.
commands.areascale.undo_creative_only: Undo is only available in creative mode.
commands.areascale.undone: Undone - the structure has been restored.
block.areascale.structure_placer.preview: Previewing - right-click again with the capsule to place it, or empty-handed to cancel.
block.areascale.structure_placer.blocked: Can't place structure here - something is in the way.
block.areascale.structure_placer.invalid: This capsule doesn't have a structure captured in it.
